title: 皐月賞の後に・一冠めっ！

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Teio! You were amazing out
there!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You've made a fan out of me today! I can't wait
to see what you do next!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I won't let you down! Since this win is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio points her index finger up in the air.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is just the first of my crowns! I'll keep on
winning until I become a Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, at Tokai Teio's request, we
continue training instead of taking a break.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'm gonna work my butt off! I wanna do
that partner running thing again.
choice_data_list: You're not tired after the race?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm totally fine! You worry too much!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sides, I can't afford to slack off now. What's my
next race, by the way?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! That race is every racer's dream!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which means every racer is gonna pull out all the
stops to win.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I gotta give it everything I've got too! Even
more than I did at the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, off to my partner run! That second crown
better be sitting pretty for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without missing a beat, Tokai Teio dashes off to
train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to rest. Our training for the
Japanese Derby begins at once.
